sqlMap.create: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS WeavePattern ( Idx INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, WeaveName TEXT NOT NULL, WeaveCode TEXT, RepeatX INTEGER NOT NULL, RepeatY INTEGER NOT NULL, Cells TEXT NOT NULL, WarpColors TEXT, WeftColors TEXT, SavedAt TEXT NOT NULL );
sqlMap.update: UPDATE WeavePattern SET WeaveCode = @code, RepeatX = @repeatX, RepeatY = @repeatY, Cells = @cells, WarpColors = @warpColors, WeftColors = @weftColors, SavedAt = @savedAt WHERE WeaveName = @name;
